windows.embed_text_v2: Prepare empty matte-black candle pouring pitcher on workbench with fragrance oil bag, scissors, glass measuring beaker and black candle vessel before melting or pouring wax.
windows.summary_v2: Setup shots of an empty black candle pouring pitcher on a workbench surrounded by prep supplies (fragrance bag, scissors, beaker), ready before any wax is added.

tags_v2.on_screen_text: MIX IT UP printed on a cardboard box (scene object)

seconds_v2.desc: Handheld view down into a black candle pouring pitcher with an empty black candle jar inside, near a window with blinds.
Camera moves to show the pouring pitcher beside cardboard supply boxes; a red 'MIX IT UP' branded carton sits on the floor.
Tight shot looking into the matte-black pouring pitcher, blurry workbench background.
Overhead of the empty black pouring pitcher on a grey cloth-covered table next to a sealed plastic fragrance/oil bag and supplies.
Closer overhead inside the empty pouring pitcher; a black candle vessel and a small glass measuring cup sit nearby.
Tilted overhead of the empty pitcher on a paper-towel pad; a black lid and clear bag of supplies are visible beside it.
Continued overhead pan of the empty pouring pitcher resting on the workbench with prep items around it.
Slight pull-back showing the pitcher on a small towel with a glass beaker of clear liquid (oil/water) on the right and a black lid in the background.
Top-down workspace view: the empty pouring pitcher sits on a folded towel; the maker (back of head only) leans over preparing, scissors and a glass cup of oil nearby.

windows.embed_text_v2: pouring molten black wax from a jug into a black container vessel, then smoothing the glossy surface level with a metal palette knife, jar on a paper towel and white cloth
windows.summary_v2: Molten black wax is poured from a jug into a black container and the surface is smoothed level with a metal spatula on a cloth-covered table.

tags_v2.action: pouring black wax into container and smoothing top

seconds_v2.desc: A black container vessel sits on a paper towel over a white cloth-covered table; glossy melted black wax fills it near the top as a dark pouring pitcher hovers above.
A black pouring jug tips into the jar, a stream of molten black wax running down into the vessel.
Black wax continues pouring into the container from the jug, the dark glossy surface rippling inside the jar.
The pour continues; molten black wax swirls and fills the black jar nearly to the rim.
Pouring jug still over the jar, ripples spreading across the shiny black wax surface as it settles.
The jug lifts away; the black wax sits glossy and nearly full in the container on the towel.
A spatula/pouring spout dips toward the jar's surface, the black wax now level and reflective inside the vessel.
The molten black wax surface ripples slightly as the tool moves over it, the jar filled to near the top.
A metal palette knife rests across the rim, smoothing and leveling the glossy black wax surface in the filled container.
